message:
feat: Implement TODO stubs with real functionality

- compress.zig: Implement BPE-aware token counting heuristic
  - Accounts for word boundaries, punctuation, whitespace, UTF-8
  - More accurate than simple chars/4 approximation

- sais.zig: Implement BWT (Burrows-Wheeler Transform) computation
  - Converts suffix array to BWT in-place
  - Returns primary index for reconstruction

- unigram_tokenizer.zig: Full JSON serialization/deserialization
  - saveToFile: HuggingFace-compatible format with vocab entries
  - loadFromFile: Parse JSON and reconstruct Unigram model

- pre_tokenizers.zig: Unicode support for gpt2PatternFull
  - Proper Unicode letter detection (Latin, Greek, Cyrillic, CJK, etc.)
  - Unicode number detection (Arabic-Indic, fullwidth digits)
  - Replaces regex-based TODO with std.unicode implementation
